TEXT: A wandering slugcat. NL In the endless cycle of ecology, it is both predator and prey.
Strong and quick, with a fierce metabolism requiring a steady diet of meat. NL  But the stomach won't be your only concern, as the path of the hunter is one of extreme peril.
Weak of body but strong in spirit. In tune with the mysteries of the world and empathetic to its creatures, your journey will be a significantly more peaceful one.
